name: Karbon-X Corp.
business: Karbon-X provides customized transactional options, tailored insights, and scalable access to the Verified Emissions Reduction markets. The company allows the public to purchase carbon offsets from a subscription-based app supporting clean energy projects such as solar, wind, methane capture, or reforestation.

exposures.sentence: Each subscription will support clean energy projects such as solar or wind power, methane capture, or reforestation and will reduce greenhouse gas emissions with provable, verifiable carbon credits.

catalysts.sentence: We soft-launched our APP in early 2023 and it was completed and made publicly available in March 2025
